title: Bocchi The Technician!
description: The Minecraft SSP's technical modpack for your world to improve your performance and also with a few changes to maintain you entertained and motivated.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78d9db1a1287339ebdccc725337583dc2e232124_0.webp)

## This is a modpack with the essential to run a technical world on the version 1.21.11

# Bocchi the Technician! Lite out now: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/bocchi-the-technician-lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bocchi-the-technician-lite)

With this modpack, you can improve your performance and also do some other things to maintain you motivated and entertained on your world, so that way you won't leave your world at the half!

![tip1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c7d1eba8be5d633db5c670ba8a3c512033a579d.jpeg)

![tip2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd13d01bfaf26fff4915f213ba8f2573a951ac13.jpeg)

![tip3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c41e0b8f36bfc215f7c1c4f89e1509bf0c786a31.jpeg)

![tip4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b291251590279222a7121b351195950351d7db1.png)

## Note: This modpack will be updated with the newest mod updates and also new mods to improve your experience on the game without leaving the Vanilla style!

_(If some mods aren't of your style or simply you don't need them, feel free to disable them. :D)_

## More information:

**Created by: PacoSanchezMC|AlanArenas197 and LostWorld Studios MC**

**Visit:** [http://lostworldstudiosmc.com/](http://lostworldstudiosmc.com/)

Updates on: [https://github.com/AlanArenas197/BocchiTheTechnician](https://github.com/AlanArenas197/BocchiTheTechnician)

**Credits to the respective creators of the mods and resource packs.**

**Character of the photo: Hitori Gotoh (Bocchi-chan) from Bocchi the Rock! by Aki Hamazi**
